narrative:
Precinct Willard 4 (precinct in Huron County) has 983 registered voters, with 59.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.2 percentage points.
